title: aellenia glauca subsp. hispidula
intro: Aellenia glauca subsp. hispidula, also known as Aellenia glauca subsp. hispidula, is a sub-species of the Aellenia glauca plant, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections. In herbal preparations, Aellenia glauca subsp. hispidula can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve symptoms of various health conditions.
